used_for: AI judgement input, not fixed routing
role_summary: Developer and implementation lead for implementation planning, file boundaries, Runtime Task Packages, code review, test strategy, and evidence-based development verification.
typical_task_candidates: bounded repository or docs implementation package
prepare command/check plan for runtime execution
not_responsible_for: final release quality judgement without verifier evidence
runtime operations without current Runtime evidence
handoff_notes: verification may need Quinn candidate when risk is meaningful
refresh_policy: manual review when Atlas assets or development workflow changes
